home.title: Echoes Bistrot · Brunch & Coffee · Ilioupoli, Athens
home.description: A quieter take on brunch in Ilioupoli, Athens. Coffee from morning, brunch all day, cocktails kept low-key. Nymfon 33.

cover.line: From morning, on the Nymfon corner.

kitchen.title: Weekend.
kitchen.subhead: Thessaloniki koulouri, eggs and coffee from morning.
kitchen.caption: From the Echoes kitchen. Coffee by Taf.
kitchen.leadA: Coffee from morning. Brunch at the table.
kitchen.plateAlt: Thessaloniki koulouri with eggs — from the Echoes kitchen

hero.headline: A quieter take on brunch.
hero.subhead: Coffee from morning, brunch all day, cocktails kept low-key.

story.title: A quieter take on brunch.
story.bodyA: On the corner of Nymfon, under red-and-yellow striped awnings, Echoes serves a quieter take on brunch.
story.bodyB: Coffee from morning, dishes with a homemade feel, and cocktails that arrive discreetly as the light fades.

menu.title: Plates that carry the rhythm of the day.
menu.subtitle: A few selected tastes from the all-day kitchen — not the full menu.
menu.viewMoreLabel: For today’s full menu, call us.

crispyChickenBowl.name: Crispy chicken bowl
crispyChickenBowl.desc: Crispy breaded chicken, romaine, croutons, parmesan.

prosciuttoEgg.name: Thessaloniki koulouri
prosciuttoEgg.desc: Basil pesto, prosciutto, eggs, smoked provolone.

scrambleChorizo.name: Scrambled eggs with chorizo
scrambleChorizo.desc: Soft scrambled eggs, chorizo, avocado, cherry tomatoes, herbs.

eggsToast.name: Eggs on toast
eggsToast.desc: House bread, sunny-side eggs, olive oil, fresh cheese.

goddessBowl.name: Goddess bowl
goddessBowl.desc: Quinoa, seasonal vegetables, hummus, fresh herbs.

beefBurger.name: Beef burger
beefBurger.desc: Brioche, smashed beef patty, house sauces.

milkshake.name: Strawberry milkshake
milkshake.desc: Fresh strawberry, vanilla ice cream, whipped cream.

chef.title: Made by hand, one plate at a time.
chef.body: Open kitchen. Deep blue tiles. Copper lamps. The team serves at its own pace — quick enough to keep things hot, quiet enough to let you talk.

social.title: A new, quieter arrival in Ilioupoli.
social.partnerBody: Coffee by Taf, one of Athens’ best-known specialty roasters.

cta.title: Come early. Leave late.
cta.subtitle: Table? Order? Call us or send a DM.
